message:
fix: resolve leftover merge conflict markers and remove duplicate thread-local scheduler code

mutation.rs: Clean up stashed merge conflict markers (<<<<<<< / ======= /
>>>>>>>) that were left behind from a prior stash-pop. The kept version uses
explicit actor IDs (100, 200, 201, 300) matching the rest of the test
suite's convention and includes the rref_access oracle baseline/mutation
tests that were only present in the "Updated upstream" side.

three_lane.rs: Remove 29 lines of dead code — a duplicate CURRENT_LOCAL
thread_local! declaration, ScopedLocalScheduler struct, and its Drop impl.
These definitions already exist earlier in the file and the duplicates
shadowed them without being reachable, causing a clippy warning.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
